info.title: AgroPlan Colombia Backend
info.description:
AgroPlan Colombia API for municipality intelligence, weather context, crop recommendations and ML-powered agronomic predictions.

Use this API to:
- Browse municipalities and departments.
- Retrieve weather, forecast and climate alerts.
- Evaluate zoning suitability and planting calendars.
- Rank crop recommendations for decision support.

Supported crops: aguacate, algodon, cana panelera, cebolla, fresa, pina, soya.

get.description: Returns service metadata and the relative Swagger URL.
Basic readiness endpoint for containers and uptime checks.
Returns the status of all infrastructure components: database, ML models, reference profiles, and golden vector validation.

Returns all municipalities covered by AgroPlan.

Use cases:
- Populate municipality selectors in frontend forms.
- Filter the catalog by department name or DANE code for localized workflows.

parameters.name: department_id

schema.description: Filter by department DANE code (2 digits, exact match)
schema.title: Department Id

parameters.description: Filter by department DANE code (2 digits, exact match)

get.description:
Returns all departments with DANE codes and municipality counts.

Use cases:
- Build department dropdowns before municipality selection.
- Validate if a department is represented in loaded data.

get.summary: Search municipalities and departments by name
get.description:
Autocomplete endpoint for the new single selector.

Returns both municipalities and departments matching the query. The frontend can use the `type` field to render the appropriate option.

Use cases:
- User types 2+ letters and selects a municipality or department.
- Department selections can be expanded to their municipalities on the frontend.

422.description: Query must be at least 2 characters.

get.description:
Finds the nearest covered municipality from a latitude/longitude pair.

Use cases:
- GPS-first UX to auto-select municipality.
- Validate if a user location is covered by current dataset.

404.description: No municipality found inside the requested distance.

get.description:
Returns one municipality by its DANE code (5 digits).

Use cases:
- Resolve user selections from stored IDs.
- Fetch municipality metadata before prediction calls.

404.description: Municipality ID does not exist in catalog.

get.description:
Returns near-real-time weather conditions for a municipality using Open-Meteo.

Use cases:
- Show current climate context before recommendations.
- Provide weather cards on municipality dashboards.

502.description: Weather upstream provider failed or is unavailable.

get.description:
Returns all ML-supported crops with full agronomic details.

Use cases:
- Detailed crop profile pages.
- Inputs for recommendation and planning interfaces.

Returns lightweight crop entries intended for quick lists/cards.

Use cases:
- Fast-loading crop pickers.
- Recommendation side panels with minimal payload.

schema.title: Response Get Crops Lite Api V1 Crops Lite Get

get.description:
Returns one crop with all agronomic fields and guidance text.

Use cases:
- Fetch details for a selected crop.
- Validate a crop identifier before prediction workflows.

404.description: Crop ID does not exist in catalog.

post.description:
Returns crop suitability for a municipality.

When ML models are loaded, uses LightGBM with 60 features. If critical features are missing, falls back to k-NN agroclimatic analogs. If no valid profile exists, returns 422.

404.description: Crop or municipality ID not found.

422.description: Critical features missing and no fallback available.

post.summary: Get zoning recommendations for all crops
post.description:
Evaluates all ML-supported crops for a municipality and returns them ranked.

Each crop indicates whether it used the primary model, a fallback, or was unavailable. No crops are filtered by threshold; the frontend decides what to display.

get.summary: Get zoning map for a crop
get.description:
Evaluates all municipalities for a crop and returns suitability scores.

Uses the primary LightGBM zoning model when artifacts are loaded; falls back to k-NN agroclimatic analogs when critical features are missing. The full payload is cached. Returns all municipalities; the frontend joins results with DANE geometry for rendering.

post.summary: [MOCK] Predict zoning suitability for all municipalities (not for MVP)
post.description:
⚠️ MOCK ENDPOINT — NOT INTENDED FOR MVP PRODUCTION USE.

Legacy mock endpoint that returns crop suitability predictions for every municipality using static heuristics instead of the production LightGBM model.

Use cases:
- Render a nationwide crop suitability map using the mock predictor.
- Compare viability across regions without issuing hundreds of single requests.

For real predictions, use POST /zoning/predict or POST /zoning/recommendations.

post.summary: [MOCK] Predict planting calendar legacy single-month (not for MVP)
post.description:
⚠️ MOCK ENDPOINT — NOT INTENDED FOR MVP PRODUCTION USE.

Builds day-level planting ratings using static crop calendar data instead of the production yield ensemble and climate signals.

This endpoint is preserved for backwards compatibility. For real multi-crop, multi-month predictions use /calendars/predict-batch.

404.description: Crop or municipality ID not found.

post.summary: Predict planting calendars for multiple crops
post.description:
Builds 12-month planting calendar predictions for multiple crops in a municipality.

Uses XGBoost/LightGBM ensemble (0.65/0.35) when yield models are loaded. Combines EVA, EcoCrop, FAO and yield signals. Returns top 3 harvest months with computed planting windows. Climate data uses Open-Meteo forecast when available; otherwise reports missing values with source tracking.

⚠️ MOCK ENDPOINT — NOT INTENDED FOR MVP PRODUCTION USE.

Ranks crops for a municipality using the legacy mock predictor and static crop metadata. This endpoint returns sample recommendations that do not reflect the production LightGBM zoning model or the XGBoost/LightGBM yield ensemble.

Use cases:
- Show a best-crop recommendation card.
- Offer alternatives and the next planting season preview.

For real zoning predictions, use POST /zoning/predict or POST /zoning/recommendations.

get.description:
Generates short-term alert cards from stored municipality forecasts.

Use cases:
- Highlight near-term climate risks in dashboards.
- Trigger proactive agronomic actions (drainage, irrigation, heat mitigation).

schema.title: Response Get Alerts Api V1 Alerts  Municipality Id  Get

get.description:
Returns stored daily climate forecast values for a municipality.

Use cases:
- Build short-term forecast charts.
- Feed rule-based alerting or planning logic.

schema.title: Response Get Daily Forecast Api V1 Forecast Daily  Municipality Id  Get

get.description:
Returns the latest climate synchronization run and forecast coverage counters.

Use cases:
- Monitor scheduled sync health from operations dashboards.
- Verify data freshness before enabling weather-dependent features.

Returns the status of all loaded ML models, profiles and golden vector validation.

Use cases:
- Verify that production models are ready before serving predictions.
- Inspect active model releases and validation results.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin API key.

403.description: Admin API key is not valid.

get.description:
Returns counts of cache entries by type and expiry status.

Use cases:
- Monitor cache hit rates and memory pressure.
- Decide when to invalidate stale entries.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin API key.

403.description: Admin API key is not valid.

post.description:
Deletes cache entries matching the optional filters.

If no filters are provided, the entire prediction cache is cleared.

Use cases:
- Force model reload after a deployment.
- Clear stale entries for a specific prediction type or scope.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin API key.

403.description: Admin API key is not valid.

get.description:
Returns the most recent prediction run entries for audit.

Use cases:
- Debug production failures and latency spikes.
- Track fallback usage and cache effectiveness.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of audit entries to return
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of audit entries to return

schema.title: Response Recent Prediction Runs Api V1 Admin Audit Recent Get
